channel.title: Disney Universal KB
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Disney Universal KB

item.title: Home
item.description: Disney + Universal Knowledge Base This is the local Obsidian-style vault for trip planning research and park strategy.

item.title: Park TODOs
item.description: Park TODOs Universal Studios Florida Confirm if this is the top Harry Potter priority day or more of a mixed day Decide whether to start with Diagon Alley or headline non-Potter rides first Mark must-dos vs nice-to-dos for simulators Decide whether Hogwarts Express is a transport tool, an attraction...

item.title: Research Standards
item.description: Research Standards What belongs here Evergreen park structure Attraction lists and park identities Early entry / early admission strategy Resort transportation and planning implications Notes that help later itinerary building What must stay marked as variable Exact operating hours Exact early-entry...

item.title: Temporary Plans - Universal Two-Day Potter Draft
item.description: Temporary Plans - Universal Two-Day Potter Draft Status Temporary proposal for review with Rodrigo and Mariangeles. Not locked.

item.title: Vault-Structure
item.description: Vault Structure Standard This document defines the canonical folder layout for the Disney-Universal KB vault.

item.title: Overview
item.description: Universal Overview Trip-specific context Stay: Universal’s Endless Summer Resort - Surfside Inn and Suites Ticket type: 3-day Park-to-Park starting 14 Apr 2026 Park dates: 14–17 Apr 2026 (hotel check-out 18 Apr) Planning implication: Park-to-Park makes Hogwarts Express useful and supports same-day p...

item.title: Astronomica
item.description: Astronomica Type Interactive/Play Community sentiment score 6.0/10 Sentiment tier: Mixed Basis: public-source consensus from widely cited fan/trip-planning sources plus public discussion patterns captured during research in Mar 2026.

item.title: Constellation Carousel
item.description: Constellation Carousel Type Ride Community sentiment score 7.1/10 Sentiment tier: Good Basis: public-source consensus from widely cited fan/trip-planning sources plus public discussion patterns captured during research in Mar 2026.

item.title: Curse of the Werewolf
item.description: Curse of the Werewolf Type Ride Community sentiment score 8.0/10 Sentiment tier: Strong Basis: public-source consensus from widely cited fan/trip-planning sources plus public discussion patterns captured during research in Mar 2026.
